MentalStateDef.label: frantic rescue
MentalStateDef.description: This mechanoid's subcore is panicking over a downed loved one. It will ignore all commands until it can rescue them.

MentalStateDef.label: peaceful departure
MentalStateDef.description: Due to retained inherent kindness, this mechanoid refuses to turn against its former masters and is leaving the area.
MentalStateDef.beginLetter: {0} has gone feral, but its retained 'Kind' trait prevents it from becoming hostile. It is peacefully leaving the map instead.
